title: Blackbeard Ambushes Law
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Bonney, Unknown person #8, Bepo, York, Unknown person #9 as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A certain sea in the new world

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Another hit like that, and the water pressure will crush us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We WON'T BE ABLE TO ESCAPE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's Land North East of Here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prepare for Battle, and be quick about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: wow, captain! You're so cute now!:)

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Do you have a death wish?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His power's contagious! They're hoping to disorient us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it'll be fine though. Our classes with the emporors taught me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Can be countered if you use a great deal of HAK!!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
